prompt: I need to build an accessible stats table for my dynasty app. It shows weekly scoring for each player on my roster: rows are players, columns are weeks (Week 1 through Week 17), plus a final column for the season total. Some players have a bye week shown as '—'. The table also has a caption explaining what it shows. How should I mark this up accessibly?

assertions.text: Recommends <caption> element for the table description
Uses <thead> with <th scope='col'> for week column headers
Uses <th scope='row'> for the player name column
Addresses the '—' bye week cell — needs accessible text (aria-label or visually hidden text), not just a dash character
Advises against role=grid since the table is read-only data (not interactive)
Addresses abbreviated column headers (e.g. 'Wk 1') — recommends <abbr> or aria-label for full text
